features.description: Your weapon attacks threaten decisive hits more often, letting the Champion turn steady offense into explosive weapon spikes over the course of a fight.
Your physical training sharpens your movement, jumps, climbs, and athletic confidence so the subclass feels like a complete combat athlete, not just a crit machine.
Your straightforward martial approach deepens with additional style support, reinforcing the Champion as the subclass of polished fundamentals and relentless weapon discipline.
In longer battles you recover your footing automatically, making it dramatically harder for attrition to wear you down once the Champion gets rolling.

champion-improved-critical.summary: Your crit range expands, making repeated clean attacks more threatening over the course of a long session.

champion-athletic-adept.summary: The Champion reads like a complete athlete, not only a crit-focused damage chassis.

champion-fighting-style-plus.summary: Double down on fundamentals and become even more defined by excellent martial basics.

champion-survivor.summary: Recover steady staying power in drawn-out fights so enemies have a harder time grinding you down.
